mapper.select:
select f.facility_id as facilityId, o.out_put_id as outPutId, o.out_put_code as outPutCode, o.out_put_name as outPutName from t_ent_poll_control_facility_relate f, t_ent_out_put_info o where o.out_put_id = f.other_id and f.other_type = #{otherType} and f.facility_id in
#{facilityId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_ent_poll_control_facility (facility_id, ent_code, out_put_type, facility_code, facility_name, pollutant, govern_process, efficiency, design_capacity, actual_operating_rate, install_date, remark, create_time) values (#{facilityId}, #{entCode}, #{outPutType}, #{facilityCode}, #{facilityName}, #{pollutant}, #{governProcess}, #{efficiency}, #{designCapacity}, #{actualOperatingRate}, #{installDate}, #{remark}, now())
mapper.update: update t_ent_poll_control_facility set facility_code = #{facilityCode}, facility_name = #{facilityName}, pollutant = #{pollutant}, govern_process = #{governProcess}, efficiency = #{efficiency}, design_capacity = #{designCapacity}, actual_operating_rate = #{actualOperatingRate}, install_date = #{installDate}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = now() where facility_id = #{facilityId}
